_comment: Curated skills from skills.sh, organized by category and tier. Edit to customize. Tier 1 = installed by default. Tier 2 = opt-in. Tier 3 = specialized (install manually).

process.description: Engineering process skills (planning, debugging, TDD, code review, subagent patterns)

skills.name: obra/superpowers
skills.description: 14 skills covering the full engineering process: brainstorming, writing-plans, executing-plans, TDD, systematic-debugging, verification-before-completion, subagent-driven-development, dispatching-parallel-agents, using-git-worktrees, using-superpowers, requesting-code-review, receiving-code-review, finishing-a-development-branch, writing-skills

typescript.description: TypeScript and modern web engineering skills

skills.name: mattpocock/skills
skills.description: 13+ skills for TypeScript engineers: tdd, grill-me, grill-with-docs, improve-codebase-architecture, to-prd, to-issues, triage, diagnose, write-a-skill, zoom-out, caveman, handoff, prototype, setup-matt-pocock-skills

caveman.description: Caveman prompting family — terse, token-efficient communication

skills.name: juliusbrussee/caveman
skills.description: 7 skills: caveman (main), caveman-commit, caveman-review, caveman-compress, cavecrew (multi-agent caveman), caveman-stats, caveman-help

frontend.description: Modern frontend (React, Next.js, shadcn, design systems)

skills.name: vercel-labs/agent-skills
skills.description: Web design and Vercel-specific skills: web-design-guidelines, vercel-react-best-practices, agent-browser, vercel-composition-patterns, vercel-react-native-skills

skills.name: anthropics/skills
skills.description: Anthropic's skills: frontend-design, pdf, docx, pptx, xlsx, skill-creator

skills.name: supabase/agent-skills
skills.description: Supabase + Postgres best practices: supabase, supabase-postgres-best-practices

skills.name: xixu-me/skills
skills.description: DevOps and tooling: github-actions-docs, develop-userscripts, openclaw-secure-linux-cloud, xget, xdrop, tzst

skills.name: leonxlnx/taste-skill
skills.description: 8 design taste variants: design-taste-frontend, high-end-visual-design, redesign-existing-projects, minimalist-ui, full-output-enforcement, industrial-brutalist-ui, stitch-design-taste, gpt-taste

skills.name: arvindrk/extract-design-system
skills.description: Extract design system from any website

browser.description: Browser automation, E2E testing, web scraping. Bundled with the CEO Engineering System (no skills.sh install required).

skills.name: agent-browser
skills.description: Vercel Labs' fast browser automation CLI + MCP server. Snapshot+refs workflow, native Rust, bundled skills for Electron/Slack/dogfood.

skills.name: e2e-testing
skills.description: End-to-end testing workflow. Stack-aware patterns for Nuxt/React/Supabase. Artifact collection, CI integration, debugging.

_skipped._comment: Intentionally not included. Too specific or off-topic for a general engineering setup.

categories.name: Azure-specific
categories.reason: Most engineers don't use Azure. Install individually if needed: npx skills add microsoft/azure-skills

categories.name: Lark/Feishu-specific
categories.reason: Only useful in Lark-using orgs. Install individually if needed.

categories.name: Video/image generation
categories.reason: Off-topic for software engineering. agentspace-so and doany-ai skills are for creative work.
